generation_policy: OneCommercial CDC inventory query/fill pages must use the admin-query-panel pattern instead of the generic admin-dashboard pattern.
The page must include a filter toolbar, primary actions, editable table fallback, pagination, and save bar.
Icon usage in the sidebar must be resolved as the Icon primitive with components-icon--gallery provenance.
Sidebar and nested menu lists must preserve Sidebar/Menu story provenance and explicit parent/child list levels.
Query filters must render Select as the Elements non-native medium combobox shell by default, with native select used only as a hidden semantic layer.
Editable table fallback must identify itself as a table list fallback and use softened semantic table borders.
Do not add KPI cards, chart panels, or generic work queues to this page subtype.
